action: Retrieve avatar IDs using the API: https://mailer.hertzai.com/all_teacher_only_avatars_id_user_id?user_id={user_id} and associate each character with a unique avatar ID from the response, saving that info as well.

recipe.steps: Fetch the user_id from the saved metadata.
Make the API call to retrieve the avatar IDs using the fetched user_id.
recipe.generalized_functions:
import requests

# Define the user_id
user_id = 10086

# Define the API URL
api_url = f"https://mailer.hertzai.com/all_teacher_only_avatars_id_user_id?user_id={{user_id}}"

# Make the API call to retrieve the avatar IDs
response = requests.get(api_url)

# Check if the response is successful
if response.status_code == 200:
    avatar_ids = response.json()
else:
    avatar_ids = None

print(avatar_ids)

recipe.steps: Associate each character from the previously created story with a unique avatar ID.
Save the associated character and avatar ID information in memory.
Request the status verifier agent to confirm the completion for the 'Creator' persona.
